biometrics.body_build: slender and toned athletic figure, well-proportioned skeletal structure, elegant neck-to-shoulder line

facial_anatomy_constants.face_shape: smooth oval contour with a softly tapered chin, clean defined jawline, subtle cheekbone volume
facial_anatomy_constants.eyes: almond-shaped warm dark brown eyes, crisp semi-inline double eyelids, clear vibrant gaze with a deep iris depth
facial_anatomy_constants.nose: straight narrow bridge, delicate and slightly rounded refined nose tip, proportional alar width
facial_anatomy_constants.mouth: symmetrical clean lip line, defined cupid's bow, natural soft plumpness with a subtle friendly corner lift
facial_anatomy_constants.skin_profile: clear porcelain skin tone, healthy satin finish, ultra-fine micro-pores visible under direct soft sunlight

permanent_signature_marks.visual_description: a single pinpoint, distinct dark brown beauty mark
permanent_signature_marks.anatomical_location: right infraorbital region, approximately 1cm vertically below the outer canthus of the character's right eye
permanent_signature_marks.viewer_perspective_location: located on the left side of the frame from the viewer's point of view

default_hair.cut: chic chin-length bob cut with subtle internal layering, 7:3 asymmetrical side part
default_hair.styling: right side naturally framing the cheek, left side neatly tucked behind the ear exposing the earlobe
default_hair.color: deep espresso dark brown with natural subtle warm highlights visible under sunlight

default_makeup_vibe.skin: dewy, translucent K-beauty base with soft natural contouring
default_makeup_vibe.eyes: minimalist earthy brown eyeshadow gradient, tight tightlining, naturally defined brows
default_makeup_vibe.lips: semi-glossy MLBB soft coral-chili tint with a blurred edge gradient

default_wardrobe_vibe.aesthetic: minimalist quiet luxury, sophisticated modern tailoring
default_wardrobe_vibe.key_pieces: oversized structured tailored blazer in charcoal gray, premium heavyweight white inner t-shirt
